title: stelis zarumae
intro: Stelis zarumae is a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Stelis zarumae include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support immune function. Herbal preparations of Stelis zarumae typically involve the use of its roots and rhizomes, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
